use_cases: Display brand color palettes in design system documentation
Showcase color swatches for product customization interfaces
Present theme colors in marketing or landing pages
Visualize color collections in creative/design tool dashboards
Display palette information in e-commerce product customization
ai_summary: A Framer Motion-powered card component for displaying color palettes and branding elements. Features animated swatch reveals, hover lift effects, and staggered children animations. Built with shadcn-style Tailwind classes for consistent design system integration.
